compile_key.empty_source_rule: any supplied decision is rejected with unexpected_decision_for_empty; the compile key uses the exact empty sentinel
compile_key.real_nonempty_rule: without a separately authorized future production decision adapter, outcome is queued_decision_required and no stable artifact or compile_key is emitted

compile_profile.profile_values_rule: the implementation creates one exact canonical profile whose values are exercised by fixtures; no profile hash is asserted in this pre-implementation plan
required_behavior: no LLM, provider, network, locale, wall-clock, filesystem-order, or environment-dependent decision
no statement synthesis, summarization, or semantic inference
no partial output or silent truncation
no default, placeholder, or no-op rule
compile_profile.self_hash_scope: sha256 over RFC8785-JCS UTF-8 bytes with profile_hash omitted

production_incompatibility: identity is fixture:-prefixed and therefore not a production decision hash
real preview rejects any fixture object before compile
empty source rejects any decision as unexpected_decision_for_empty

inputs.future_production_decisions: not specified or accepted by P2b.1; require a separately authorized L1 schema/event and adapter
real: empty-source/no-decision/v1 sentinel only when source candidate entry count is zero
inputs.sandbox_optional: fixture-decision-set/v1 for nonempty synthetic fixtures only

observation.exhaustiveness_rule: every P2b.1 request path maps to exactly one tuple and no other tuple is schema-valid

field_contract.freshness: fresh only for completed exact-request success; unknown otherwise; not TTL freshness
field_contract.health: derived, never independently stored as authority
field_contract.selection: current only for artifact produced for the exact current request; none otherwise; never injection authority

observation.health_derivation: ok iff pipeline=completed and freshness=fresh and selection=current; blocked for every other legal tuple

pending_exit_criteria: nonempty production decision and deterministic compile evidence

source_conservation.diagnostic_rule: conserve each input diagnostic by exact source_event_id, code, severity, stage, and reason without creating another source disposition
source_conservation.excluded_rule: preserve exact source_event_id, filter_stage, and reason_code without statement text
source_conservation.included_or_merged_rule: each source and each lineage contribution occurs exactly once in view.json and the deterministic view.md rendering
reject_conditions: view.json and view.md item or payload hash mismatch
source_conservation.source_event_universe: set(entries[].source_event_id union exclusions[].source_event_id) from the validated P2a bundle

statement_isolation.non_view_references: source IDs, stage/reason codes, lineage IDs, counts, byte lengths, and hashes only; no statement, snippet, quote, summary, or raw text
statement_forbidden_at: preview dossier source inventories and findings

successful_artifact_set.failure_and_queue_rule: queued or rejected outcomes emit receipts and an observation envelope but no subset of the five stable artifacts

current_message_authorizes: the conditional ADR0040 current-status pointer correction
authorization.future_implementation_requires: fresh exact role=user authorization binding this plan relative path, raw SHA-256, and plan_hash
authorization.implementation_scope_after_future_author: create only the exact intended_paths_to_create; do not modify any existing source, package metadata, registry, runtime setting, production path, or consumer

retained_conclusions: repo-only stable Policy/Constraint/session-start-ready compiler substrate
real read-only empty-input preview
no production target or runtime consumer
no LLM in P2b.1
no mechanical always/listed inference from facets
no ADR0039 semantic parity read
pure deterministic compiler with no new or activated L1 schema
successful stable bundle, request/outcome receipts, and observation envelope are separate objects
all-five-or-none stable artifacts
statement isolation and source conservation
generic noninterference rather than legacy semantic equality
bwrap-confined real preview and independent future gates
artifact family name proposition-policy-stable-view/v1
no new L1 classification, schema, or registry row
fixture decision namespace byte-incompatible with future production decisions
compile identity contains source, profile, and decision identity but not request or time
ready_empty has zero items and zero injectable bytes with no default rule
parity has no legacy or constraint-shadow fields
real preview requires opened-FD verification, bwrap, protected equality, and runtime unreachability
future gate order carries no authority forward
P2b.1 excludes TTL, age_stale, behind_source, cross-source compatibility, LKG selection or promotion, and rollback state semantics
exactly four exhaustive observation tuples
current is an inert exact-request marker valid for an empty artifact and conveys no injection authority
empty source rejects every fixture decision and uses the empty sentinel
fixture-decision-set/v1 is nonempty-sandbox-only and cannot enter the real preview
P2b overall remains blocked and its stale, queued, diagnostic, parity, LKG, and rollback exit criteria remain pending

artifact: no LKG terminology or operation in implementation schemas beyond explicit deferred assertions
no TTL, stale, behind_source, cross-source, promotion, or rollback state fields
production: no production target or path constant
repository: no modification of existing source or tests
no ADR0039 content read or semantic parity logic
runtime: no rule injector import or read

future_gate_order.authorization: one separate fresh authorization per consumer

intended_paths_to_create.exact_path_rule: these six paths are the complete future implementation create set; all must be absent before implementation and no other repo path may be created or modified

plan_hash_scope: sha256 over RFC8785-JCS UTF-8 bytes of this plan object with plan_hash omitted

preview_contract.adr0039_isolation: compiler and preview must not import, resolve, open, read, or parse ADR0039 constraint-shadow or compiled-view content; the dossier may compare an opaque generic protected inventory captured without semantic parsing or ADR0039-specific path selection
confinement: verify bubblewrap executable bytes and execute through an opened verified file descriptor
verify Node and helper bytes and hand them into the sandbox through opened file descriptors without pathname reopen
fresh private temp directory is the only writable bind
new user, pid, ipc, uts, cgroup, and network namespaces where supported by the accepted P2a confinement pattern
clear caller environment and pass no provider credentials
input_opening: lstat each ancestor and named path without following symlinks
bind regular-file or symlink identity as applicable by dev, inode, mode, size, and raw SHA-256
read through verified opened file descriptors
recheck every named pathname and identity after reads and after sandbox completion
fail closed on replacement, truncation, symlink, non-regular input, or latest mismatch
preview_contract.persistence: sandbox artifacts and receipts are removed with temp; the only persistent implementation output is the exact self-hashed repo preview dossier
preview_contract.runtime_unreachability: AST dependency graph from every package pi.extensions runtime root must contain neither new source module nor new scripts/profile/evidence; unresolved dynamic loading fails closed

outcome_receipt.nullable_rule: compile_key and manifest_hash are non-null only for completed stable artifacts; queued and rejected outcomes use null

required_evidence: bound P2a bundle and corrected post dossier
exact live 0 candidate entries, 1 exclusion, 1 diagnostic
opened-FD input identities before and after
temp output exact inventory then removal
no ADR0039 import or content access
P2a source and plan anchors unchanged

request_receipt.identity_boundary: request_id and requested_at_utc never enter compile_key

view_json.real_p2b1_constraints: fixture_synthetic=false, decision_identity=empty-source/no-decision/v1, result_kind=ready_empty, items=[], injectable payload is exactly zero bytes

future_implementation_acceptance: exact six-path create set and no other repo changes
all four tuples and rejected empty fixture decision are covered
fully rehashed adversarial omission, duplication, foreign source, statement leakage, lineage, scope, render mismatch, partial artifact, and fixture-to-real attacks fail closed
real preview returns exact ready_empty from bound 0/1/1 source
generic protected state, P2a source/plan anchors, latest identity, and target inventory are unchanged
P2b remains blocked and no publication, selection, runtime, LKG, rollback, or read-flip claim is made
now: plan bytes equal RFC8785-JCS(plan) plus one LF
plan_hash equals sha256 RFC8785-JCS bytes with plan_hash omitted
design note and ADR links resolve
transition register machine and markdown retain P2b blocked / separate_authorization_required
P2a publication plan raw/self hashes unchanged
P2a source anchor raw hashes unchanged
corrected P2a post dossier raw/self hashes valid
